first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. The scores are the same, and both identify the same core strengths (seasoned Staff-level engineer, recent relevant AI experience) and concerns (lacks 8+ years of specific AI experience, missing key technologies like vector databases/RAG). The minor differences in wording and the specific technical keywords highlighted (e.g., Python vs. MCP) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in judgment based on the candidate's work locations.
